data.name: Tray_BalloonRunning
data.value: Application is running in the system tray.

data.name: Tray_ExitConfirmMessage
data.value:
Are you sure you want to close KoruMsSqlYedek?
Note: The Windows Service will continue running, scheduled backups will not be affected.

data.name: Program_CriticalErrorMessage
data.value:
An unexpected error occurred.
Detailed information is available in the log file.

data.name: Program_ThreadErrorMessage
data.value:
An error occurred.
Detailed information is available in the log file.

data.name: PlanList_LoadError
data.value:
An error occurred while loading the plan list.
{0}

data.name: PlanList_DeleteConfirm
data.value:
Are you sure you want to delete the plan '{0}'?
This action cannot be undone.

data.name: PlanEdit_RemoveTargetConfirm
data.value: Do you want to remove the target '{0}'?

data.name: ManualBackup_PleaseSelectDb
data.value: Please select at least one database.

data.name: Backup_ServiceNotConnected
data.value: Service is not connected. Please start the service.

data.name: ManualBackup_CloseWhileRunning
data.value: Backup is in progress. Cancel and close?

data.name: Settings_BackupPathRequired
data.value: Default backup directory cannot be empty.

data.name: Settings_SmtpSenderRequired
data.value: Sender email is required when SMTP server is specified.

data.name: Settings_SmtpRecipientRequired
data.value: Recipient email is required when SMTP server is specified.

data.name: Settings_SavedMessage
data.value:
Settings saved successfully.
Language change requires application restart.

data.name: Settings_SmtpTestBody
data.value: This is a test email. Your SMTP settings are working correctly.

data.name: FileSource_PathRequired
data.value: Source directory path cannot be empty.

data.name: Restore_NoSelection
data.value: Please select a backup record from the list.

data.name: Restore_VerifyOk
data.value: Verification successful. Backup file is valid.

data.name: Restore_VerifyFail
data.value: Verification failed. Backup file may be corrupt.

data.name: Restore_Confirm
data.value: Restore the database '{0}'? This operation will overwrite the existing database.

data.name: Restore_Failed
data.value: Restore failed. Check the log for details.

data.name: Restore_NoHistory
data.value: No backup records found for this plan.

data.name: Restore_TargetDbEmpty
data.value: Target database name cannot be empty.

data.name: Restore_NoBakInArchive
data.value: No .bak file found in extracted archive.

data.name: Restore_CancelConfirm
data.value: An operation is in progress. Cancel it?

data.name: Update_AvailableMessage
data.value: Koru MsSql Yedek v{0} has been released. Would you like to update?

data.name: Update_NoUpdateMessage
data.value: You are using the latest version (v{0}).

data.name: Update_CheckFailed
data.value: Update check failed. Please check your internet connection.

data.name: Update_BalloonMessage
data.value: Koru MsSql Yedek v{0} has been released. Click to update.

data.name: Update_SilentSuccess
data.value: Update v{0} installed successfully. Restart the application to apply.

data.name: Update_SilentFailed
data.value: Silent update failed: {0}. Falling back to manual update.

data.name: Update_SilentRestartMessage
data.value: v{0} has been installed silently. Restart the application to apply changes.

data.name: Settings_AutoSilentUpdate
data.value: Install updates silently in the background

data.name: Settings_MinimizeToTray
data.value: Hide in system tray when minimized

data.name: Settings_SmtpTitle
data.value: Saved SMTP Profiles — you can add multiple profiles and use them in plans:

data.name: Settings_SecurityInfo
data.value: Prompts password on app launch and critical operations (deleting plans etc.). If you forget your password, you can reset it using the security question.

data.name: Backup_StatusReady
data.value: Ready — select a plan from the list.

data.name: PlanEdit_Step2Hint
data.value: Databases are listed automatically when SQL connection is successful.

data.name: PlanEdit_Verify
data.value: Run integrity verification after backup (RESTORE VERIFYONLY)

data.name: PlanEdit_Step5Hint
data.value: Manage cloud or remote targets where backup files will be copied. Google Drive, FTP/SFTP and UNC network shares are supported.

data.name: PlanEdit_Tip_PlanName
data.value: Unique name for this backup plan. Example: "Micro Data Night Backup", "Weekly Archive"

data.name: PlanEdit_Tip_Enabled
data.value: If disabled, the plan will not be run by the scheduler. You can still take manual backups.

data.name: PlanEdit_Tip_LocalPath
data.value: Local directory where backup files will be saved. Example: D:\Backups\KoruMsSqlYedek If you add cloud targets, files are saved here first, then uploaded. Note: Make sure there is enough disk space.

data.name: PlanEdit_Tip_Server
data.value: SQL Server address. Examples: • localhost • 192.168.1.100 • SERVER\SQLEXPRESS • server.domain.local,1433

data.name: PlanEdit_Tip_AuthMode
data.value: Windows: Connects using current session credentials. SQL Server: Requires username and password.

data.name: PlanEdit_Tip_SqlUser
data.value: Username for SQL Server authentication. Example: sa, backupuser

data.name: PlanEdit_Tip_SqlPassword
data.value: SQL Server password. Stored encrypted with DPAPI, not saved as plain text.

data.name: PlanEdit_Tip_Timeout
data.value: Connection timeout (seconds). Default: 30 sec. Increase if network is slow.

data.name: PlanEdit_Tip_TrustCert
data.value: Check this for local or test servers using self-signed SSL certificates. If unchecked, a valid CA certificate is required.

data.name: PlanEdit_Tip_TestSql
data.value: Tests SQL Server connection with entered credentials. If successful, databases are listed automatically.

data.name: PlanEdit_Tip_SelectAll
data.value: Selects or deselects all databases in the list.

data.name: PlanEdit_Tip_Databases
data.value: Check the databases you want to back up. System databases (master, model, msdb, tempdb) are not listed.

data.name: PlanEdit_Tip_FileBackupEnabled
data.value: Backs up open/locked files (Outlook PST/OST, Excel, SQL MDF) using VSS. Works independently from SQL backup.

data.name: PlanEdit_Tip_FileSources
data.value: File/folder sources to back up. You can define separate include/exclude patterns for each source.

data.name: PlanEdit_Tip_Strategy
data.value: Full Only: Backs up all data every time. Simple but large. Full + Diff: Regular full + changes. Balanced solution. Full + Diff + Incremental: Least space, fastest — enterprise recommendation.

data.name: PlanEdit_Tip_FullCron
data.value: Set the schedule for full backup. Contains all database data — sufficient alone for restore. Recommendation: Once a week (e.g. Sunday night 02:00)

data.name: PlanEdit_Tip_DiffCron
data.value: Backs up data changed since last full backup. For restore: Full + last Diff backup needed. Recommendation: Once a day (e.g. every night 02:00)

data.name: PlanEdit_Tip_IncrCron
data.value: Backs up data changed since last backup (full or incremental). Smallest size. For restore: Full + Diff + all Incremental chain needed. Recommendation: Every hour (e.g. business hours 09-18)

data.name: PlanEdit_Tip_AutoPromote
data.value: After this many diff/incremental backups, a full backup is automatically triggered. Prevents chain breaks, improves restore reliability. Default: 7 (automatic full backup weekly)

data.name: PlanEdit_Tip_Verify
data.value: After each backup, file integrity is verified with SQL Server's RESTORE VERIFYONLY command. If a corrupt backup is detected, notification is sent immediately. Recommendation: Always keep enabled.

data.name: PlanEdit_Tip_Algorithm
data.value: LZMA2: Best compression ratio (recommended). LZMA: For legacy compatibility. BZip2: Medium level. Deflate: Fastest, largest file.

data.name: PlanEdit_Tip_Level
data.value: None: No compression. Fast: Low compression, fast processing. Normal: Balanced. Maximum: High compression. Ultra: Highest compression, slowest.

data.name: PlanEdit_Tip_ArchivePassword
data.value: AES-256 encryption for 7z archive. Leave empty for unencrypted archive. Password is stored protected with DPAPI.

data.name: PlanEdit_Tip_RetentionTemplate
data.value: Select a preset template or choose Custom to set manually.

data.name: PlanEdit_Tip_Retention
data.value: Keep Last N: Keep the last N backups, delete older ones. Day Limit: Delete backups older than specified days. Both: Both rules apply together.

data.name: PlanEdit_Tip_KeepLastN
data.value: Number of backup files to keep. Default: 30

data.name: PlanEdit_Tip_DeleteDays
data.value: Backups older than this many days will be deleted. Default: 90 days (3 months)

data.name: PlanEdit_Tip_ProtectPlan
data.value: If checked, password will be required for plan editing and deletion.

data.name: PlanEdit_Tip_PlanPassword
data.value: Password that will be asked for plan editing and deletion.

data.name: PlanEdit_Tip_RecoveryPassword
data.value: If you forget the plan password, you can use this to access it.

data.name: PlanEdit_Tip_CloudTargets
data.value: Targets where backup files will be sent. You can define multiple targets.

data.name: PlanEdit_Tip_EmailEnabled
data.value: Backup results will be notified via email. SMTP settings must be configured correctly.

data.name: PlanEdit_Tip_Toast
data.value: Shows backup status via taskbar notification balloon.

data.name: PlanEdit_Tip_ReportEnabled
data.value: If enabled, backup summary report will be sent via email at specified frequency. Content: Success/failure count, size, duration.

data.name: PlanEdit_Tip_ReportFreq
data.value: Daily: Previous day's summary every day. Weekly: Last week's summary every Monday. Monthly: Last month's summary on the 1st.

data.name: PlanEdit_Tip_ReportHour
data.value: Hour when report will be sent (0-23). Default: 08:00

data.name: PlanEdit_Tip_ReportEmail
data.value: Email address where report will be sent. If left empty, notification email is used.

data.name: Pw_Prompt
data.value: Enter your password to edit the plan:

data.name: FileSource_StatusHint
data.value: Browse folders and check items to select files

data.name: GoogleOAuth_Info
data.value: Enter the OAuth 2.0 Desktop Client credentials from Google Cloud Console.

data.name: About_Description
data.value: SQL Server Backup & Cloud Sync System

data.name: Tip_Dashboard_Status
data.value: Shows the current application status. • Ready: No operation in progress. • Running: A backup or restore is active.

data.name: Tip_Dashboard_NextBackup
data.value: Displays the time of the next scheduled backup. If no plans are active, it shows "—".

data.name: Tip_Dashboard_ActivePlans
data.value: Number of backup plans currently enabled. Only enabled plans are counted and scheduled.

data.name: Tip_Dashboard_LastBackups
data.value: Lists the most recent backup results. Shows date, plan name, type, and status for quick overview.

data.name: Tip_Plans_New
data.value: Create a new backup plan. The wizard guides you through: SQL connection, databases, schedule, cloud targets, and notification settings.

data.name: Tip_Plans_Edit
data.value: Edit the selected backup plan. Double-click a plan row to open it directly.

data.name: Tip_Plans_Delete
data.value: Delete the selected backup plan. This does NOT delete existing backup files — only the plan configuration.

data.name: Tip_Plans_Export
data.value: Export the selected plan as a JSON file. Useful for backup or transferring plans between machines.

data.name: Tip_Plans_Import
data.value: Import a plan from a JSON file. Restores a previously exported backup plan configuration.

data.name: Tip_Plans_Refresh
data.value: Refresh the plan list. Reloads plan status and schedule information from configuration.

data.name: Tip_Plans_Search
data.value: Filter plans by name. Type part of a plan name to quickly find it. Example: "daily" to find "DailyFullBackup".

data.name: Tip_Plans_BackupNow
data.value: Start an immediate backup for the selected plan. Runs independently of the schedule.

data.name: Tip_Plans_StopBackup
data.value: Stop the currently running backup for this plan. The backup will be cancelled safely.

data.name: Tip_Backup_Type
data.value: Select the backup type: • Full: Complete database backup (recommended for first run). • Differential: Only changes since last full backup (faster, smaller). • Incremental (Log): Transaction log backup (minimal size).

data.name: Tip_Backup_Start
data.value: Start a manual backup for the selected plan. Select a plan from the grid and choose the backup type first.

data.name: Tip_Backup_Cancel
data.value: Cancel the running backup operation. Any partially created files will be cleaned up.

data.name: Tip_Log_FileSelect
data.value: Select a log file to view. Log files are rotated daily and stored in the Logs folder. Example: log-20260101.txt

data.name: Tip_Log_Level
data.value: Filter log entries by severity: • Verbose/Debug: Detailed diagnostic info. • Information: Normal operations. • Warning: Potential issues. • Error/Fatal: Failures that need attention.

data.name: Tip_Log_AutoTail
data.value: Automatically scroll to the latest log entries. New log lines will appear at the bottom in real time.

data.name: Tip_Log_Search
data.value: Search within log entries. Type keywords to filter — e.g., "error", "timeout", a database name.

data.name: Tip_Log_PlanFilter
data.value: Filter logs by a specific backup plan. Shows only log entries related to the selected plan.

data.name: Tip_Log_Clear
data.value: Clear all filters and show all log entries.

data.name: Tip_Log_Refresh
data.value: Reload the log file from disk. Use this to see the latest entries if auto-tail is off.

data.name: Tip_Log_Export
data.value: Export the currently filtered log entries to a file. Useful for sharing logs with support or archiving.

data.name: Tip_Settings_Language
data.value: Change the application language. Currently supported: Turkish (Türkçe) and English. Requires application restart to take full effect.

data.name: Tip_Settings_StartWithWindows
data.value: Launch the application automatically when Windows starts. The app starts minimized to the system tray. Recommended for continuous backup scheduling.

data.name: Tip_Settings_MinimizeToTray
data.value: Minimize to system tray instead of taskbar. The app continues running in the background. Double-click the tray icon to restore.

data.name: Tip_Settings_AutoSilentUpdate
data.value: When enabled, updates are downloaded and installed automatically in the background without prompting. The app restarts after installation completes.

data.name: Tip_Settings_DefaultBackupPath
data.value: Default folder for storing backup files. Each plan can override this with its own path. Example: D:\Backups\SQL

data.name: Tip_Settings_LogRetention
data.value: How many days to keep log files. Older log files are automatically deleted. Default: 30 days. Set 0 for unlimited.

data.name: Tip_Settings_HistoryRetention
data.value: How many days to keep backup history records. Older records are removed from the history database. Default: 90 days. Set 0 for unlimited.

data.name: Tip_Settings_Theme
data.value: Switch between Dark and Light theme. Changes take effect immediately.

data.name: Tip_Settings_LogColorScheme
data.value: Color scheme for the log viewer console. Choose a theme that's comfortable for reading logs.

data.name: Tip_Settings_Save
data.value: Save all settings and apply changes. Some settings (like language) require a restart.

data.name: Tip_Settings_Cancel
data.value: Discard unsaved changes and revert to previous settings.

data.name: Tip_Settings_SmtpAdd
data.value: Add a new SMTP email profile. Used for sending backup success/failure notifications. Example: office365, gmail, custom SMTP server.

data.name: Tip_Settings_SmtpEdit
data.value: Edit the selected SMTP profile settings.

data.name: Tip_Settings_SmtpDelete
data.value: Delete the selected SMTP profile. Plans using this profile will lose notification capability.

data.name: Tip_Settings_SmtpTest
data.value: Send a test email using the selected SMTP profile. Verifies that the email configuration works correctly.

data.name: Tip_Settings_PasswordSetup
data.value: Set or change the master password. When enabled, editing or deleting plans requires password entry. A security question is also configured for password recovery.

data.name: Tip_Settings_SecurityInfo
data.value: Password protection prevents unauthorized changes to backup plans. The password is stored as a secure hash — it cannot be recovered, but can be reset via the security question.

data.name: Tip_Cloud_DisplayName
data.value: A friendly name for this cloud target. Shown in the plan wizard when selecting targets. Example: "Google Drive - Production", "FTP Archive"

data.name: Tip_Cloud_ProviderType
data.value: Select the storage provider type: • Google Drive: Cloud storage via OAuth 2.0 authentication. • FTP/FTPS/SFTP: Remote server file transfer. • UNC Path: Windows network share (\\server\share).

data.name: Tip_Cloud_Enabled
data.value: Enable or disable this cloud target. Disabled targets are skipped during backup uploads.

data.name: Tip_Cloud_Host
data.value: FTP/SFTP server hostname or IP address. Example: ftp.example.com or 192.168.1.100

data.name: Tip_Cloud_Port
data.value: Server port number. Defaults: FTP=21, FTPS=990, SFTP=22. Change only if your server uses a non-standard port.

data.name: Tip_Cloud_Username
data.value: Username for FTP/SFTP or UNC authentication. For UNC: DOMAIN\username format. Example: backup_user

data.name: Tip_Cloud_Password
data.value: Password for FTP/SFTP or UNC authentication. Stored encrypted with Windows DPAPI (machine-bound).

data.name: Tip_Cloud_GoogleAuth
data.value: Authenticate with Google Drive via OAuth 2.0. Opens a browser window for Google account authorization. Authorization is one-time; the token is stored locally.

data.name: Tip_Cloud_LocalPath
data.value: Local folder path or UNC network share path. Example: D:\BackupArchive or \\server\backups$ For UNC paths, provide credentials below if needed.

data.name: Tip_Cloud_RemotePath
data.value: Remote folder path on the target server. Created automatically if it doesn't exist. Example: /Koru MsSql Yedek or Koru MsSql Yedek

data.name: Tip_Cloud_Bandwidth
data.value: Maximum upload speed in MB/s. Set 0 for unlimited bandwidth. Useful to avoid saturating the network during business hours.

data.name: Tip_Cloud_TrashRetention
data.value: Days to keep deleted files in trash/archive. When backup retention deletes old files from cloud, they stay in trash for this many days before permanent deletion. Set 0 to delete immediately.

data.name: Tip_Smtp_DisplayName
data.value: A friendly name for this SMTP profile. Example: "Office 365", "Gmail Notifications"

data.name: Tip_Smtp_Host
data.value: SMTP server address. Examples: smtp.office365.com (Office 365) smtp.gmail.com (Gmail) smtp.example.com (Custom)

data.name: Tip_Smtp_Port
data.value: SMTP server port. Common ports: 587 (STARTTLS), 465 (SSL), 25 (unencrypted). Recommended: 587 with SSL enabled.

data.name: Tip_Smtp_UseSsl
data.value: Use SSL/TLS encryption for the SMTP connection. Highly recommended for security. Required by most modern email providers.

data.name: Tip_Smtp_Username
data.value: Email account username for SMTP authentication. Usually your full email address. Example: backup@example.com

data.name: Tip_Smtp_Password
data.value: Email account password or app-specific password. For Gmail: Generate an "App Password" in Google Account settings. For Office 365: Use account password or app password.

data.name: Tip_Smtp_SenderEmail
data.value: The "From" email address shown in notifications. Usually the same as the username. Example: backup@example.com

data.name: Tip_Smtp_SenderName
data.value: Display name shown in the "From" field. Example: "Koru MsSql Yedek" or "Backup System"

data.name: Tip_Smtp_Recipients
data.value: Email addresses that receive backup notifications. Separate multiple addresses with semicolon (;). Example: admin@example.com; dba@example.com

data.name: Tip_Smtp_Test
data.value: Send a test email to verify the SMTP configuration. A test message will be sent to the recipient addresses.

data.name: Tip_Restore_Grid
data.value: List of successful backups available for restore. Select a row to enable verify and restore actions. Shows date, database name, type, file path, and size.

data.name: Tip_Restore_TargetDb
data.value: Database name to restore into. Defaults to the original database name. You can change it to restore to a different database. Warning: Existing database will be overwritten!

data.name: Tip_Restore_PreBackup
data.value: Take a safety backup of the target database before restoring. Strongly recommended to prevent data loss. The safety backup is saved in the default backup path.

data.name: Tip_Restore_Verify
data.value: Verify the backup file integrity without restoring. Runs SQL Server's RESTORE VERIFYONLY command. Checks that the backup is readable and not corrupt.

data.name: Tip_Restore_Restore
data.value: Start the database restore operation. This will OVERWRITE the target database! A confirmation dialog will appear before proceeding.

data.name: Tip_Restore_Close
data.value: Close the restore dialog. If an operation is in progress, you'll be asked to cancel it first.

data.name: Tip_Pw_Password
data.value: Enter the master password or plan-specific password. This is required for editing or deleting backup plans.

data.name: Tip_Pw_Forgot
data.value: Forgot your password? Click to answer the security question. If the answer is correct, the password protection will be removed.

data.name: Tip_Pw_SecurityAnswer
data.value: Enter the answer to your security question. The answer is case-insensitive.

data.name: Tip_Pw_VerifyAnswer
data.value: Verify your security answer. If correct, password protection will be removed.

data.name: Tip_PwSetup_NewPassword
data.value: Create a new master password (minimum 4 characters). This password will be required for plan editing/deletion.

data.name: Tip_PwSetup_ConfirmPassword
data.value: Re-enter the password to confirm. Must match the password entered above.

data.name: Tip_PwSetup_SecurityQuestion
data.value: Set a security question for password recovery. Example: "What is your pet's name?" Choose something only you would know.

data.name: Tip_PwSetup_SecurityAnswer
data.value: Answer to the security question (case-insensitive). This answer will be used to reset the password if forgotten.

data.name: Tip_PwSetup_Save
data.value: Save the password and security question. Password protection will be activated immediately.

data.name: Tip_PwSetup_RemovePassword
data.value: Remove password protection entirely. Plans can be edited/deleted without a password. The security question will also be removed.

data.name: Tip_GoogleOAuth_ClientId
data.value: OAuth 2.0 Client ID from Google Cloud Console. Format: xxxxxxxx.apps.googleusercontent.com Create at: console.cloud.google.com → APIs → Credentials

data.name: Tip_GoogleOAuth_ClientSecret
data.value: OAuth 2.0 Client Secret from Google Cloud Console. Starts with "GOCSPX-..." for desktop applications. Stored encrypted with DPAPI on this machine.

data.name: Tip_GoogleOAuth_Save
data.value: Save the custom Google OAuth credentials. Leave both fields empty to use built-in default credentials.

data.name: Tip_GoogleOAuth_Remove
data.value: Remove custom credentials and revert to built-in defaults. Existing Google Drive connections will use the default credentials.

data.name: Tip_FileSource_SourceName
data.value: A short name to identify this file backup source. Example: "Outlook PST", "Project Files", "Documents"

data.name: Tip_FileSource_Navigate
data.value: Browse to a folder to quickly navigate the tree view. The selected folder will be expanded in the tree.

data.name: Tip_FileSource_TreeView
data.value: Select files and folders to include in backup. Check the boxes next to items you want to back up. Parent folders automatically include all children.

data.name: Tip_FileSource_IncludePatterns
data.value: Only files matching these patterns will be backed up. Leave empty to include ALL files. Separate patterns with semicolons (;). Example: *.pst; *.docx; *.xlsx

data.name: Tip_FileSource_ExcludePatterns
data.value: Files matching these patterns will be EXCLUDED from backup. Overrides include patterns. Example: *.tmp; *.log; ~$*; Thumbs.db

data.name: Tip_FileSource_Recursive
data.value: Include files in all subdirectories of selected folders. Uncheck to back up only files in the top-level folder.

data.name: Tip_FileSource_UseVss
data.value: Use Volume Shadow Copy Service to back up locked files. Required for: Outlook PST/OST, databases, open documents. Enable this if you see "file in use" errors during backup.

data.name: Tip_FileSource_Enabled
data.value: Enable or disable this file backup source. Disabled sources are skipped during backup execution.

data.name: PlanEdit_RetTplMinimal
data.value: SQL Full: last 3 • Diff: 7 • Log: 14 • File archive: 5 backups

data.name: PlanEdit_RetTplStandard
data.value: SQL Full: last 7 • Diff: 14 • Log: 30 • File archive: 14 backups

data.name: PlanEdit_RetTplExtended
data.value: SQL Full: last 14 • Diff: 30 • Log: 90 • File archive: 30 backups

data.name: PlanEdit_RetTplGFS
data.value: GFS — Daily 7 / Weekly 4 / Monthly 12 / Yearly 2 (for Full)

data.name: PlanEdit_RetTplCustom
data.value: Manually specify cleanup rule and number of backups to keep.

data.name: Smtp_HostRequired
data.value: Please enter the SMTP server address.

data.name: Smtp_RecipientRequired
data.value: Please enter at least one recipient address for the test email.

data.name: FileSource_StatusHint
data.value: Browse folders and check items to select backup sources
